children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation type.
children.behavior: Check that command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'. Return the command type or raise an error.

acceptance_criteria.description: Valid command returns the correct command_type

children.stop_reason: Pure validation function with no side effects

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'place' command: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order record, send notification.
children.behavior: Sequentially call internal sub-steps: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order, send notification. On failure, rollback previous steps.

global_vars.description: Read stock levels, write reserved counts

data_operations.description: Read product stock, decrement available, increment reserved
Insert payment record with status 'pending' or 'completed'

constraints.description: All inventory items must have sufficient stock before charging payment
Payment must be charged before reserving inventory

acceptance_criteria.description: Inventory is reserved for all items in the order
Payment record is created with correct amount
On failure, all changes are rolled back

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'cancel' command: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status.
children.behavior: Sequentially call internal sub-steps: verify order, refund payment, restore inventory, update status. On failure, rollback.

global_vars.description: Read order status, update to cancelled
Read payment record, update status to refunded

data_operations.description: Read order details, update status to 'cancelled'
Read reserved counts, decrement reserved, increment available
Read payment record, update status to 'refunded'

constraints.description: Order must exist and not be in 'shipped' or 'cancelled' status
Payment must be refunded before restoring inventory

acceptance_criteria.description: Inventory is restored for all items in the order
On failure, all changes are rolled back

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' command: return current order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Look up order by order_id in orders data store, retrieve status and estimated delivery, return result.

global_vars.description: Read order status and delivery info

constraints.description: Order must exist in the system

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns current order status and estimated delivery time
Raises error if order_id not found

governance_notes: Global state conservation verified: orders (read_write) covered by CancelOrder (read_write) and TrackOrder (read) and PlaceOrder (write); inventory (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (read_write) and CancelOrder (read_write); payments (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (write) and CancelOrder (read_write). All parent required operations are satisfied across children.
